title: Apps
heading: Apps & Games
intro: Explore games, mobile apps, developer tools, and digital products from BarkinMad Studios for iPhone, iPad, macOS, and the web.

hero.alt: BarkinMad Studios games, mobile applications and software projects

description: Browse the growing BarkinMad Studios portfolio, including the connected ZX Series of retro arcade games, standalone mobile apps, developer tools, productivity products, and future software projects.

content.heading: Mobile Apps, Games & Digital Products
paragraphs: Discover a growing collection of games, developer tools, mobile apps, prototypes, and software products designed for iPhone and iPad.
The goal is to create software that is easy to use, enjoyable to interact with, and built for long-term support.
The portfolio includes entertainment-focused experiences and practical applications, combining modern mobile technology with a strong focus on usability and performance.

content.heading: The ZX Series
paragraphs: The [ZX Series](/zx-series) is the flagship collection of retro-inspired arcade games from BarkinMad Studios.

Games in the series can share achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer systems, progression features, and future cross-game rewards, creating a connected arcade ecosystem across multiple titles.
Current and planned games include [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), and additional future releases.

content.heading: Beyond Gaming
paragraphs: Beyond games, BarkinMad Studios develops practical mobile applications and software solutions, including score tracking tools, developer analytics products such as [StudioDash](/apps/studiodash), business utilities, prototypes, and productivity-focused products.
The same skills used to build commercial software and business systems also help shape the architecture, reliability, and user experience of public applications.
Learn more about our [software development services](/services), custom applications, and business solutions.

sections.title: ZX Series
sections.description: Explore the connected [ZX Series](/zx-series) of retro-inspired arcade games featuring achievements, leaderboards, [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series), multiplayer modes, shared progression systems, and future roadmap features.

sections.title: Apps & Tools
sections.description: Browse standalone applications, developer tools, productivity tools, score tracking apps, utilities, prototypes, and future software projects developed by BarkinMad Studios.
